item.title: GAME The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! ~Dungeon and Mystery Girl~ announced for PS5, PS4, Switch,
item.content:encoded:
Publisher SUNSOFT and developer Rocket Studio have announced GAME The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! ~Dungeon and Mystery Girl~, a fast-paced arena shooter adaptation of the anime The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! It will launch for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 23 worldwide.

Here is an overview of the game, via SUNSOFT:

About

A fast-paced arena shooter.

Dive into a fast-paced arena shooter where the controls are simple but the battles test your strategy!

Explore dungeons filled with summoners who unleash waves of enemies, relentless attackers, and the fearsome “Phantom” that hunts you down without mercy.

Level up to boost your stats and grab equipment from treasure chests to strengthen your character. With each upgrade offering random sets of three options, your character grows differently every time you play.

Choose three party members before entering the dungeon. Each combination changes your active and passive skills, dramatically altering your tactics.

Clear all the challenges in each stage and defeat the mighty boss lurking in the depths of the dungeon!

Game-Exclusive Story

Experience a brand-new, fully voiced adventure that branches off from the early events of The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!

After parting ways with Emalia, Hibiki takes on jobs to earn money together with Lillian, Claude, and Vene. The group sets out into a forest to collect materials for a quest—a forest where people have been mysteriously disappearing. Suddenly, they fall into a magical trap that whisks them away to a strange dungeon…

Will Hibiki and the others be able to escape from the dungeon? And who is the mysterious girl they encounter within its depths?

Watch the announcement trailer and first gameplay footage below. Visit the official website here: English / Japanese.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Gameplay

item.title: Street Fighter 6 DLC character Ingrid teaser trailer
item.content:encoded:
Capcom has released the teaser trailer for Street Fighter 6 downloadable content character Ingrid, who is due out in late spring.

Street Fighter 6 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam.

Watch the trailer below.

DLC Character Ingrid Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/street-fighter-6-dlc-character-ingrid-teaser-trailer
